---
name: "Feature Request"
about: "Request new functionality that doesn't exist yet"
title: ""
labels: "feature"
assignees: ""
---

## User Story

As a **[site admin / end user / developer]**, I want **[action]** so that **[outcome]**.

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who has this problem and how often?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. If you have a specific approach in mind, describe it — but we'll evaluate alternatives during shaping.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Scope

What should this feature NOT do? Any boundaries worth noting.

## Additional Context

Any other context — mockups, links to similar features in other plugins, Help Scout conversations, etc.
